The **2021 CS [Golden Spin of Zagreb](/wiki/Golden_Spin_of_Zagreb "Golden Spin of Zagreb")** was held on December 7–11, 2021 in [Sisak, Croatia](/wiki/Sisak,_Croatia "Sisak, Croatia").[[1]](#cite_note-announcement-1) It was part of the [2021–22 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2021%E2%80%9322_ISU_Challenger_Series "2021–22 ISU Challenger Series").[[2]](#cite_note-ISU-2390-2) Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, women's singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dance](/wiki/Ice_dance "Ice dance").

The non-Challenger portion of the event for juniors was cancelled.[[3]](#cite_note-ISU-GSZ-3)
